headline: Is Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (BR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is BR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. on Bob’s Payment Stock Substack by Bob Hammel. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on BR. Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc.’s share was trading at $148.98 as of June 8th. BR’s trailing and forward P/E were 16.19 […]
